docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,389.95 FILED BY HAKIM, ANABELLE S. AS TO DEFENDANT ALMATARI, NABIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAKIM, ANABELLE S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALMATARI, NABIL $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,180.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALMATARI, NABIL
